summary: Correct saved-mode type candidate policy: ownership is favorites-only, and general type scoring uses only skills unlocked by the saved star level.
rootCause: Update08.15 broadened name/ownership matching, but the correct model is two-stage: (1) candidate ownership is whether the general/equipment is favorited in the save data, and (2) general type scoring must be based on skills unlocked at the saved star level. generalStars/generalSettings/inheritedSkills are not ownership sources by themselves.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The policy fix is implemented in external JavaScript and validation tools.

savedCandidatePolicy.allDataMode: All candidates are considered owned; general stage max exposes all skills for type scoring.
savedCandidatePolicy.savedDataModeOwnership: Only save.generals / save.equipments favorites are ownership sources for type candidate visibility.
savedCandidatePolicy.savedDataModeSkillScoring: Saved generalStars resolve unlocked general skills; unowned skill-derived feature rows are excluded before HadoTypeScore.score.
savedCandidatePolicy.zeroScorePolicy: Owned/favorited candidates remain visible even when the saved-star scoped score is zero.

minimumUserAcceptance: Import the provided save data, switch to saved-data mode, set/check star values for favorited generals, open type candidates, and verify candidates are favorites only while scores change according to saved star-unlocked skills.
